title: Kalaburagi Ring Road
summary:
The Kalaburagi Ring Road is a 22.5-kilometer (14.0 mi) long, four-laned ring road in the city of Kalaburagi.
All trucks, buses, and heavy vehicles in the town are diverted via the Ring Road.
